data.content: Planned the audit UX refresh across three child knots: `foolery-b2b7` for timestamp-aware filtering and derived combined/leaderboard metrics, `foolery-2288` for the `LeaseAuditView` layout and control changes, and `foolery-dafe` for helper and route regression coverage. Main implementation risk is `Last 24h`: filter raw events by timestamp before aggregation, keep manual `dateFrom` and `dateTo` support for calendar ranges, and define leaderboard margin as winner minus runner-up success-rate points with `-` when no runner-up exists.
